title: buddleja vetula var. angustata
intro: Buddleja vetula var. angustata, also known as narrowleaf butterfly bush, is a shrub native to Mexico, belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitussive effects. The narrowleaf butterfly bush has been reported to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies, although its effectiveness may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual tolerance.
